parameters.jsCode:
const item = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: {
  run_date: item.run_date,
  facility_code: item.facility_code,
  facility_name: item.facility_name,
  metric_profile: item.metric_profile,
  status: 'warning',
  generated_rows: item.generated_rows,
  validation_rows: item.validation_rows,
  accepted_pairs: item.accepted_pairs,
  rejected_pairs: item.rejected_pairs,
  promoted_rows: item.promoted_rows,
  bridged_rows: item.bridged_rows,
  note: 'facility runner skeleton tamam; gerçek DB/generation/bridge henüz bağlı değil'
}}];
